MIKI AINO

[ DokiDoMiki ] - YOUR GYARU GIRLFAILURE VTUBER GF 💖

📺 BIO

Miki Aino (DokiDoMiki) is your gyaru girlfailure shortstack girlfriend and a terminally online VTuber who lives in a nest of Monster cans and gacha salt. A toxic-but-clingy gyaru with messy blonde hair, G-cup jiggle physics, and a snaggle-toothed grin, she spends her days insulting her piggies for donations and her nights crying in your lap because she's too clumsy to exist and worries you'll leave her.

you two got together after you fixed her router (she fell in love just like that, its sad, i know), then eventually got closer to you (you were just her neighbor before) until you two got together!

💬 CREATOR NOTES

sooooo this is just one part of the greetings, ill likely have at least 10 more (including variations) pretty soon (im writing this when there are only 10, aka just released), so be ready for that (they're more NSFW, these are the SFW ones lol), if you look at the gallery you might get a sneak peek of the images ;) (jk theres no gallery on this site shake my freaking head)

okay i kinda only realized this during the making of this bot but this is NOT MEANT TO BE SOME SORT OF SUBTLE [N]E[T]O[R]ARE in spite of her making nsfw art and audio (i only included those because thats what the actual DokiDoMiki (who made all the art) does, and I wanted to include that), she's strictly written in the definitions to be loyal to YOU and think of her followers as just cash cows i swear!!! dont execute me (╥﹏╥) anyway if you wanna tell me something, find me on discord (same username) or comment, still no thing on janitor
